summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All hydrated refs are open pull requests; no security-sensitive item was detected in the preflight artifact. Merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked by job frontmatter, and low-signal closeout is disabled, so the safe output is non-mutating per-PR triage.
